title: Agent Degree Frontmatter
description: Portable metadata schema for the YAML frontmatter of .degree.md files.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the degree.

version.description: Semver version for this degree definition.

description.description: Short explanation of when this degree is useful.

includeSkills.description: Skill ids or skill-family ids to prefer for the initial context bundle.

softExcludeSkills.description: Skill ids or skill-family ids to avoid unless requested by the user or justified by concrete task evidence.

recommendedTools.description: Advisory tools that are usually useful for this degree, such as MCP servers, CLIs, package managers, browsers, or data tools.

activationHints.description: Natural-language hints, file patterns, tools, or domain phrases that suggest this degree is relevant.

aliases.description: Optional alternate names users may use for this degree.

confidenceThreshold.description: Optional advisory resolver threshold from 0 to 1. Below this value, ask the user to choose.

notes.description: Optional maintainer notes for humans reviewing the degree.

skillId.description: Portable skill reference. Runtime adapters may map this to local skill names.

id.description: Stable portable tool id. Runtime adapters may map this to local tool names.

purpose.description: Short reason this tool is useful for the degree.

when.description: Optional activation guidance for this tool.

optional.description: Whether the tool is helpful but not expected to be available.
